daily_summary.headline: Exciting Aurora and Launch Day Ahead!

top_events.title: Aurora Borealis Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2-level geomagnetic storm is expected, offering a good chance to view the aurora borealis at latitudes as low as 60°.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're in high-latitude regions.

top_events.title: Long March 2D Launch
top_events.description: Launch of Long March 2D carrying an unknown payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for updates.

top_events.title: Spectrum 'Onward and Upward' Test Flight
top_events.description: Isar Aerospace's Spectrum rocket is set for its second test flight, carrying multiple cubesats.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
